Name: World Bank Group — IFC
Focus: Banking & financial sector reform|Infrastructure (power, transport)|Climate finance & green bonds|SME lending programs|Capital market development
Key Projects: Backed VPBank, Techcombank, VIB. Funded Mekong Delta climate resilience. Supporting FTSE upgrade preparation.

Name: Asian Development Bank (ADB)
Focus: Infrastructure (roads, power, water)|Climate change adaptation|Financial sector development|Urban development|Health & education
Key Projects: Ho Chi Minh City metro line, Mekong Delta flood management, national power grid expansion, financial inclusion programs.

Name: Japan International Cooperation Agency (JICA)
Focus: Infrastructure (Noi Bai–Lao Cai highway, metro)|Industrial zone development|JCM carbon credits|Technology transfer|Human resource development
Key Projects: Largest bilateral donor. Funded Long Thanh Airport, HCMC Metro, Da Nang port. Key partner in JCM carbon credits.

Name: Korea Development Finance (EDCF/KOICA)
Focus: Smart city development|E-government|Fintech cooperation (KRX system)|Green growth|Vocational training
Key Projects: KRX trading system for HOSE/HNX. Smart city pilots in Da Nang. Korea-Vietnam fintech cooperation MOU.

Name: KfW Development Bank (Germany)
Focus: Renewable energy (solar, wind)|Energy efficiency|Green building finance|Environmental protection|Urban infrastructure
Key Projects: Funded Vietnam's largest solar farm financing. Green credit lines through Vietnamese banks.

Name: Agence Française de Développement (AFD)
Key Projects: HCMC metro line 3, Da Nang sustainable urban development, green credit lines for Vietnam banks.

Name: International Finance Corporation (IFC — World Bank)
Focus: Banking sector reform|SME finance|Climate-smart agriculture|Renewable energy|Capital markets
Key Projects: Equity investments in VPBank, TPBank, HDBank. Vietnam Manufacturing Competitiveness program. Green bond framework support.

Name: European Bank for Reconstruction & Development (EBRD)
Focus: Green economy transition|Financial institutions|Infrastructure|Energy transition|SME support
Key Projects: Entered Vietnam 2022. Focus on energy transition and green finance. Credit lines to Vietnamese banks.
